name: project-laser-game
description:
Easter egg from Supercell's Brawl Stars working in desktop browser with arrow key and space bar controls:
https://andrei-paraschiv.github.io/project-laser-game/

scripts.build:android: npm run build && npx cap sync android && cd android && gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.build:electron: npm run build && node scripts/prepare-electron.js && npx electron-packager dist_for_electron "Project Laser" --platform=win32 --arch=x64 --out=dist_electron --overwrite --asar

author: IsraelDXPP
